description_long: This is an old, weathered gravestone made of stone, featuring a rounded top and a rectangular base. The surface is heavily eroded, with visible patches of lichen and rough, chipped edges, giving it a distinctly aged appearance. The front face is inscribed with text and symbols, though much of the writing is worn and partially illegible due to years of exposure. The top section displays a carved motif, possibly a skull and crossbones or other funerary symbol, common in historic grave markers. The back of the gravestone is less detailed, with faint remnants of additional inscriptions or decorative elements. The base is embedded in a slab of earth or stone, suggesting it was once set firmly in the ground.
description: A weathered, stone gravestone with a rounded top, eroded inscriptions, and a rough, lichen-covered surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main inscription and a carved motif at the top, with significant surface erosion and lichen.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the thickness of the gravestone and the rough, chipped edges along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals faint, less detailed inscriptions and a continuation of the rough, aged texture.
description_view_3: This rear-side angle emphasizes the gravestone's depth and the weathered, irregular surface on the back.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: partially legible text, possible dates and names, carved motif (skull and crossbones or similar)
